prompts.name: Starship Bridge
prompts.text: Place the scene on a futuristic starship bridge with holographic displays, sleek control panels, clean metallic surfaces, and a sense of deep-space exploration.

prompts.name: Orbital Station
prompts.text: Place the scene inside or near a large orbital station with curved windows, advanced technology, and a breathtaking view of a planet below.

prompts.name: Android Laboratory
prompts.text: Create a high-tech android laboratory with clean white surfaces, diagnostic equipment, soft blue lighting, and refined futuristic machinery.

prompts.name: Mecha Hangar
prompts.text: Place the scene in a massive mecha hangar with towering machines, maintenance platforms, industrial lighting, and a grand sense of scale.

prompts.name: Alien World
prompts.text: Set the scene on an alien world with unfamiliar terrain, exotic plant life, strange atmospheric colors, and a believable otherworldly environment.

prompts.name: Space Colony
prompts.text: Create a space colony environment with domed habitats, advanced infrastructure, artificial atmosphere, and a clean futuristic settlement design.

prompts.name: Hologram Room
prompts.text: Place the subject in a hologram-filled room with translucent interface panels, floating data displays, and soft futuristic glow.

prompts.name: Cybernetic Clinic
prompts.text: Create a cybernetic medical clinic with advanced prosthetics, surgical lights, clean glass surfaces, and precise technical detail.

prompts.name: Zero Gravity
prompts.text: Create a zero-gravity scene with floating objects, soft motion, suspended hair or clothing, and a graceful sense of weightlessness.

prompts.name: Mars Base
prompts.text: Set the scene in a Mars research base with red dust outside, sealed modular structures, scientific equipment, and rugged survival detail.

prompts.name: Nebula Window
prompts.text: Place the subject near a large spacecraft window overlooking a colorful nebula, distant stars, and soft cosmic light.

prompts.name: Robot Companion
prompts.text: Add a friendly robot companion with clean readable design, polished surfaces, expressive mechanical details, and believable scale.

prompts.name: Futuristic City
prompts.text: Create a futuristic city with sleek towers, elevated transit, glowing signs, advanced architecture, and dense urban life.

prompts.name: Power Core Chamber
prompts.text: Place the scene inside a power core chamber with glowing energy, circular machinery, reflective surfaces, and controlled technological drama.

prompts.name: AI Archive
prompts.text: Create an AI archive filled with glowing data towers, quiet servers, holographic memory panels, and a thoughtful futuristic atmosphere.
